## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`npm run test:ci`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] Build succeeds (`npm run build`)
- [ ] No new `npm audit` high/critical vulnerabilities
- [ ] PR targets `develop` (or `main` for hotfixes)
